description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners. The front features a large, black touchscreen display bordered by a slim bezel, with a small front-facing camera and sensor array at the top center. The back is a smooth, dark surface with two camera lenses and a flash arranged vertically in the upper left corner. The sides are slim and appear to be made of a matte or lightly textured material, with visible buttons for volume and power. The overall design is minimalist and contemporary, typical of high-end mobile devices. The object is compact and lightweight, suitable for handheld use in urban environments.
description: A sleek, modern smartphone with a large black touchscreen, dual rear cameras, and a minimalist design with slim side buttons.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large black touchscreen display with a small camera and sensor at the top center.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the slim profile and multiple elongated buttons, likely for volume and power.
description_view_2: Back view revealing a smooth dark surface with two vertically aligned camera lenses and a flash in the upper left corner.
description_view_3: Right side view showing a slim edge with a few small buttons or ports, maintaining the minimalist profile.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen is blank and turned off, showing no visible content or interface elements.
attribute_camera_placement: Two camera lenses and a flash are vertically aligned in the upper left corner on the back; a single front-facing camera is centered above the screen.
attribute_button_layout: Multiple elongated buttons are visible on the left edge, likely for volume and power; a few small buttons or ports are present on the right edge.
